title: Re-baseline docs and validation gates
description: Align docs/progress.md and docs/regression_matrix.md with the verified merged-main behavior before wider migration changes start.
acceptance: conda run -n isaaclab-newton pytest diffaero_newton/tests/test_train_entry.py -q passes

conda run -n isaaclab-newton python diffaero_newton/source/diffaero_newton/scripts/train.py --algo apg --env position_control --dynamics quadrotor --quadrotor-control-mode body_rate --quadrotor-max-body-rates 3.0 3.0 1.5 --quadrotor-k-angvel 5.0 4.0 3.0 --quadrotor-drag-coeff-xy 0.05 --quadrotor-drag-coeff-z 0.1 --max_iter 1 --l_rollout 1 --n_envs 1 --device cpu --log_interval 1 passes
docs/progress.md no longer contains mutually contradictory fixed-vs-blocked statements
docs/regression_matrix.md matches the current verified quadrotor status
review_focus: Prevent docs drift between merged main and actual local validation
Do not overstate quadrotor parity just because the factory regression is fixed
